detail: The Hanoi Grand - A Luxury Collection Hotel
Open 24 hours. Always available to assist.
Complimentary breakfast included for Club Suite guests. Available for other guests at additional charge.
Vietnamese Dong (VND) and USD accepted. Major credit cards accepted (Visa
Wheelchair accessible rooms available. Elevator access to all floors. Please inform us of any special requirements.

Full banquet and event facilities available. Contact events@hanoigrand.com for packages.
